Root cause identified: The `401 Unauthorized` status code indicates that the request to `https://coaileague.com/api/mascot/holiday` was rejected by the server because the client did not provide valid authentication credentials. Analyzing issue: network_failure - GET https://coaileague.com/api/user/view-mode returned 401

Root cause identified: The '401 Unauthorized' status indicates that the request to `GET https://coaileague.com/api/user/view-mode` was made without valid authentication credentials. This typically occurs when a user is not logged in, their session has expired, or the authentication token (e.g., JWT) is missing, invalid, or incorrectly attached to the request, preventing the Express.js backend from identifying or authenticating the user for a resource that requires it. A component rendered on the `/pricing` page (likely a global element such as a header, navigation bar, or a user context provider) is attempting to fetch user-specific data that requires an authenticated user.
